title: Budget to include additional salary
doc_html:
§512. Budget to include additional salary

           The governing authority of each of the parishes composing the Twenty-Third Judicial District shall annually, and at the same time it prepares its general budget of expenses, budget an amount sufficient to pay the salaries fixed in R.S. 16:511.
doc_text:
§512.  Budget to include additional salary
The governing authority of each of the parishes composing the
Twenty-Third Judicial District shall annually, and at the same time it prepares
its general budget of expenses, budget an amount sufficient to pay the salaries
fixed in R.S. 16:511.
